name: behavior.analyzeAndRetrieve
description: Analyze a task, retrieve relevant behaviors, and get recommendations in one call. This high-level tool combines behaviors.getForTask, bci.retrieve, and bci.composePrompt, reducing context window usage by returning everything needed to start a task.

task_description.description: Natural language description of the task to perform (required)

include_prompt.description: Whether to compose a BCI prompt with retrieved behaviors
